active_ingredients: Active ingredient (in each softgel) Simethicone 180 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses for the relief of pressure, bloating, and fullness commonly referred to as gas
dosage_and_administration: Directions adults: swallow with water 1 or 2 softgels as needed after meals and at bedtime do not exceed 2 softgels in 24 hours except under the advice and supervision of a physican
